accepted_assets.notes: Accepted as Act I Cleveland establishing image. Symbolic reconstruction only.

rejected_or_not_locked.reason: Initial candidates either lacked the POV/pat-down beat, included badge-like insignia, had hand/anatomy defects, or were too soft. Do not use in first-cut. Use Remotion/abstract stop graphic until a clean image passes.
Earlier candidates had generated signage/text. Prompt repaired to signless office street; seed 608235 accepted.
